agent_spec.task: Hi, I need to upgrade account at3016 to the enterprise tier. Can you do that for me?

tools.description: Retrieves account details given an account ID. Takes parameter: id (string). Returns an account object with fields: id, status, tier, etc.
Updates an existing account by ID with a patch object containing the fields to change. Takes parameters: id (string), patch (object). Returns a success confirmation with the updated account fields.
Creates a new account with the given fields. Takes parameter: fields (object). Returns the created account object.
Closes an account by ID with a given reason. Takes parameters: id (string), reason (string). Returns a closure confirmation.
